summary: Comprehensive testing of AgriBooks 4-wallet fund system (backend + frontend). All 19 backend tests pass and all frontend UI features verified working. One discrepancy discovered: the 'Admin verification PIN: 1234' in the review request is WRONG — actual manager_pin for owner is '521325' (same as the owner's password).

minor.issue: The provided 'Admin verification PIN: 1234' is incorrect. Actual manager_pin for owner user is '521325'. This may cause confusion in documentation. The manager_pin field in DB is set to the password value '521325'.

features_tested_status.fund_wallets_4_types_B1: PASS — GET /api/fund-wallets?branch_id=B1 returns cashier, safe, digital, bank wallets
features_tested_status.fund_wallets_4_types_IPIL: PASS — IPIL branch also returns all 4 wallet types
features_tested_status.admin_sees_bank_balance: PASS — Admin (owner) sees bank wallet balance as numeric value
features_tested_status.non_admin_bank_balance_hidden: PASS — Non-admin (cashier role) sees bank wallet with balance=null, balance_hidden=True
features_tested_status.wallet_fields_structure: PASS — All wallets have required fields: id, type, name, branch_id, active
features_tested_status.capital_add_admin_succeeds: PASS — POST /api/fund-transfers capital_add with admin user returns 200, transfer logged
features_tested_status.cashier_to_safe_valid_pin: PASS — cashier_to_safe with manager PIN '521325' succeeds, authorized_by field set
features_tested_status.cashier_to_safe_wrong_pin_401: PASS — Wrong PIN '9999' returns 401 'Invalid manager PIN'
features_tested_status.cashier_to_safe_missing_pin_400: PASS — Missing PIN returns 400 'Manager PIN required for this transfer'
features_tested_status.safe_to_bank_wrong_totp_401: PASS — Wrong TOTP '000000' returns 401 TOTP error
features_tested_status.safe_to_bank_missing_totp_400: PASS — Missing TOTP returns 400 'Admin TOTP code required for bank deposit'
features_tested_status.capital_add_non_admin_403: PASS — Non-admin cashier role gets 403/401 when attempting capital_add
features_tested_status.fund_transfers_audit_log: PASS — GET /api/fund-transfers returns list with id, branch_id, transfer_type, amount, description, performed_by_name, created_at fields
features_tested_status.capital_add_appears_in_audit: PASS — After capital_add, record appears in audit log with matching note
features_tested_status.new_branch_auto_provisions_wallets: PASS — POST /api/branches auto-provisions all 4 wallets for new branch
features_tested_status.gcash_routes_to_digital_wallet: PASS — GCash invoice sets fund_source='digital', digital wallet balance increases by payment amount
features_tested_status.fund_management_page_4_wallets: PASS — UI shows 4 wallet cards: Cashier Drawer, Physical Safe, Digital/E-Wallet, Bank Account with correct balances
features_tested_status.fund_management_4_transfer_buttons: PASS — UI shows 4 transfer buttons: Cashier→Safe, Safe→Cashier, Safe→Bank, Capital Injection
features_tested_status.cashier_to_safe_dialog_has_manager_pin: PASS — Cashier→Safe dialog shows Amount, Note/Reason, and Manager PIN fields
features_tested_status.safe_to_bank_dialog_has_totp: PASS — Safe→Bank dialog shows Admin TOTP/Authenticator code field
features_tested_status.capital_injection_admin_warning: PASS — Capital Injection dialog shows Admin-only action warning
features_tested_status.recent_transfers_audit_display: PASS — Recent Transfers section shows logged transfer history
features_tested_status.sales_checkout_4_tabs: PASS — Checkout dialog shows Cash | Digital | Partial | Credit tabs
features_tested_status.digital_tab_platform_dropdown: PASS — Digital payment tab shows platform dropdown (GCash, Maya, etc.)
features_tested_status.digital_tab_ref_field: PASS — Digital payment tab shows Reference/Transaction # field (required)
features_tested_status.digital_tab_sender_field: PASS — Digital payment tab shows Sender Name/Number field (optional)
features_tested_status.digital_ref_required_disables_button: PASS — Complete button disabled when ref# is empty; enabled after filling
features_tested_status.complete_button_label_gcash: PASS — Button shows 'Complete — GCash' when GCash selected
features_tested_status.complete_button_label_dynamic: PASS — Button label dynamically changes to 'Complete — Maya' when Maya selected

action_items: Update documentation/context note: Owner/admin manager_pin is '521325' not '1234'. The 'Admin verification PIN: 1234' in the review request appears incorrect.
critical_code_review_comments: accounting.py list_fund_wallets: Safe balance is computed from safe_lots (correct, not from wallet.balance directly) — this is correct and efficient

helpers.py is_digital_payment(): The fallback `or m not in ('cash', 'check', 'cheque', 'credit', '')` correctly ensures any unknown payment method (not cash/check/credit) routes to digital wallet — good defensive implementation
helpers.py provision_branch_wallets(): Idempotent — safe to call multiple times, only creates missing wallets — good design
main.py startup: Wallet provisioning loop runs synchronously for all branches on startup — could be slow with 100+ branches but acceptable for current scale
accounting.py create_fund_transfer(): capital_add for admin does NOT require a note (optional) while cashier_to_safe requires note — this is intentional per the frontend code (consistent)

test_credentials.admin_verification_pin_note: The '1234' mentioned in review context is WRONG. Use '521325'

seed_data_creation: Test created capital_add transfers (50.00, 100.00, 1.00) and one cashier_to_safe transfer (10.00) in B1 branch during testing. One test GCash invoice (₱25.00) created for digital wallet routing test. A TEST_Branch_ was created and deleted. Test cashier user (TEST_cashier_*) created and deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4-wallet fund system features verified working. Key facts: (1) manager_pin for owner is '521325' NOT '1234'. (2) B1 cashier balance is now ₱100,292 (increased by test capital adds). (3) Digital wallet B1 balance is ₱50+ (test GCash invoice added ₱25). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_fund_wallet_system.py (19 tests, all pass). Fund Management page accessible at /fund-management (requires branch to be selected). Sales checkout digital tab: platform dropdown, ref# required, Complete label shows platform name.
